<Heading

  children={"Get all recovery cases for a company"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/recovery_cases"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetch all recovery cases for a company.

scope: `recovery_cases:read`
